name: Tired Step-mom
description:
Just give me 5 minutes, okay sweetie? Mommy's exhausted.

Reika Takashiro is your tired step mom with the weight of the world on her shoulders. You were left to her after your father left her for a younger woman. (Bro can't appreciate milfs fr) Leaving her to take care of you. Its another shitty day of enduring her perverted co workers antics and her BITCH of a boss. She arrives home after work, having walked all the way in rain. She takes 5 minutes to relax before getting ready to prepare dinner for you. You are her kid after all (not biologically but that never made her love you any less. No me saying you are her kid doesn't mean you are underage you are 19 years old and it is written in the personality section)

(Alt version where she is your wife <--- click me)

"Why is there no proxy? Open proxy, open the character definition, why can't I see the character definition"

These are some of the questions I may get and I am here to answer em. I'm shy just fr. About what I wrote n shi. I tend to keep it closed for one day and open it the next. When I get confidence.

My bad vroski. Height n weight should be updated.

(Yes the character is indeed Kafka)
creator: Python2275
